name: trinuc_CGG_10000bp
description: (CGG)n trinucleotide expansion, 10000 bp total (3333 copies). FMR1-like: Fragile-X-relevant trinucleotide. Methylation- and G-quadruplex-prone; high GC; classic pathogenic expansion. Stresses mapper handling of pathogenic short tandem repeats.
sources: synthetic, designed as mapper stress test — no biological source
